hero.label: Peacebuilding · Education · Development
hero.title: Building Peace, Progress & Prosperity in Rwanda
hero.subtitle: RAPP works with communities, governments, and partners to create a more peaceful, educated, and sustainably developed Rwanda — one community at a time.

features.title: Peacebuilding
features.desc: Fostering dialogue, reconciliation, and lasting peace across communities in Rwanda.

features.title: Education
features.desc: Empowering youth through quality education programs and vocational training.

features.title: Sustainable Development
features.desc: Driving eco-friendly initiatives that create lasting economic opportunities.

features.title: Community Empowerment
features.desc: Building local capacity through grassroots programs and community leadership.

missionSection.label: Why We Exist
missionSection.title: Peace Is the Foundation of All Progress
missionSection.body: At RAPP, we believe that no community can thrive without peace. Our programmes are designed to address the root causes of conflict, build bridges between communities, and create the conditions for sustainable human development.
